Free Audit Funnels
Ideal for experienced Facebook marketers that are comfortable running audits on client accounts LIVE but that don't necessarily have case studies or
Level: Experienced
Case Studies: No
Niche: Not Required but recommended
Cost Per Lead: $45
Variations: Lead Ad, Conversion Campaign, or Messenger
NOTE: Post to a group or to your network to get a recording of a sample live audit
HOW IT WORKS
ABOUT THIS FUNNEL
Provides the perfect opportunity to showcase your knwoledge, build authority and credibility WITHOUT needing case studies or testimonials.
Typically - about 35% of these leads will convert into high paying clients (if you ensure you screen properly from the get-go)
The audit should preferably take place LIVE as this will establish the most trust and provide you with an opportunity to pitch
LONG TERM STRATEGY
The funnels below only show you the direct lead gen aspect - however, we recommend the following to ensure you build a powerful brand for yourself:
1. Place all those that booked a call into an email/SMS automation list and market to them with content regularly
2. Create a Custom Audience of those that booked a call and those that opted in and target your FB page's normal content to them to stay top of mind and
reinforce credbility (make sure you exclude those that already booked)
